# Canonical robots.txt — deployed via frontend/public/ (see gcp-frontend-deploy.sh).
# Do not edit public/robots.txt at repo root (not deployed).

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://agrr.net/sitemap.xml

Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth/

Allow: /research
Allow: /about
Allow: /contact
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms
